title: 📘 قواعد الوحدة 15: Past Simple of 'to be' (was/were) & There was/There were

topics.name: 1. الماضي البسيط للفعل (be)
topics.rule: نستخدم was مع المفرد (I, he, she, it) و were مع الجمع (we, you, they). يدل على أحداث في الماضي.
examples: She was at home last night.

topics.name: 2. النفي (Negative)
topics.rule: نضيف not بعد was/were: was not (wasn't), were not (weren't).

topics.name: 4. There was / There were
topics.rule: نستخدم There was للمفرد، و There were للجمع، للتعبير عن وجود شيء في الماضي.
examples: There was a bank near my house.
There were ten children in the park.

common_mistakes: ❌ They was happy. → ✅ They were happy.
❌ There were a cat. → ✅ There was a cat.
❌ Was you late? → ✅ Were you late?
